arts.ttl: Juventus Makes History with Youngest Ever Squad in Champions League Knockouts
arts.sum: Juventus are set to make history as they field their youngest-ever starting lineup in a Champions League knockout match, with an average age of just 25 years and 171 days. As the Bianconeri face PSV Eindhoven in the first leg of their playoff round, this milestone reflects the club's bold reliance on youth under head coach Thiago Motta.
